sections.paragraph:
ἕλιγμα, ατος, τό (fr. ἕλιξ ‘spiral’, s. ἑλίσσω; Soranus 155, 5; Athen.; Hesych.) package, roll σμύρνης καὶ ἀλόης J 19:39 v.l., certainly erroneous (for μίγμα).—S. GRudberg, Eranos 15, 1915, 67. S. μίγμα and σμῆγμα.—DELG s.v. ἕλιξ.

  1. fr. = from

Soranus Soranus , I–II a.d.—List 5

Athen Athen , III a.d.—List 5

Hesych Hesych , V a.d.—List 5

Eranos Eranos , Acta Philologica Suecana—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 317
